published_title: Approaches to Encouraging Health Exchange Participation
authors: Soheil Ghili; Igal Hendel; Michael Sullivan; Michael Whinston
note: Listed under Working Papers on Ghili's Yale SOM page and Google research site (checked both). Coauthors: Igal Hendel, Michael Sullivan, Michael Whinston.

Elena Prager's research page (sites.google.com/view/eprager/research) explicitly lists status 'R&R at Journal of Political Economy'. Also NBER WP w33727 (April 2025) and SSRN 5233086. R&R counts as revise-and-resubmit.

authors: Itai Ater; Adi Shany; Brad Ross; Shoshana Vasserman

authors: Keisuke Ito; Ali Hortacsu; Eric Richert

authors: Pietro Tebaldi; Jonas Lieber; Alexander Torgovitsky

authors: Panle Jia Barwick; Shanjun Li; Tianli Xia

authors: Harold Chiang; Jack Collison; Lorenzo Magnolfi; Christopher Sullivan
note: Working paper per Magnolfi's site (checked). Has an extended abstract in Proceedings of the 26th ACM Conf. on Economics and Computation (EC'25), but that is a CS conference proceeding, not a peer-reviewed economics journal; no journal publication/R&R. Authors: Harold Chiang, Jack Collison, Lorenzo Magnolfi, Christopher Sullivan.

published_title: Double Duty: A Subsidy Design for Quality Promotion and Price Discipline
authors: Ying Fan; Yiyi Zhou; Colleen Carey

Current title 'Double Duty: A Subsidy Design for Quality Promotion and Price Discipline' (agenda phrased it differently). No journal, R&R, or acceptance found. Authors: Ying Fan, Yiyi Zhou, Colleen Carey.

Sole-authored job market paper (2024-25 cycle), listed under Working Papers on Obolensky's homepage, updated April 2026. Winner of 2025 IIOC Rising Star Paper Prize. No journal/R&R/acceptance indicated.

authors: Kirill Borusyak; Jiafeng Chen; Peter Hull; Lihua Lei

authors: Bradley Larsen; Carol Hengheng Lu; Anthony Lee Zhang
